results.rendered_html:
paridevanaṃ, -nā, paridevitaṃ
1 Lamentation, complaint, bewailing; atha taiḥ paridevitākṣaraiḥ  Ku. 4. 25 ;  R. 14. 83 ;  Bg. 2. 28 ; tatra kā paridevanā  H. 4. 71 ;  Y. 3. 9. 
2 Repentance, regret.
